title: verbascum × harknessii
intro: Verbascum × harknessii, also known as the Harkness' Mullein or Verbascum, is a biennial herb native to Great Britain, belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and ease congestion. Verbascum × harknessii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like glycerin or ethanol.
